description: Legal document concerned with a house and its seller the elder [...] b. Netanel ha-Levi. Probably a draft. Dated: 1437 Seleucid, which is 1125/26 CE. Other names mentioned (many of them relating to the  borders of the property): a house named after Muʾammal al-Kātib al-[...]; the daughter of Abū Malīḥ(?); and [...] b. Ṣadaqa. Also mentions the price of 155 [...]. (Information in part from CUDL.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
